/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -flto -o metronome_engine.cpython-314-darwin.so CMakeFiles/metronome_engine.dir/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/metronome_engine.dir/metronome_engine.cpp.o   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -lportaudio
